g.text: SETUP MODE — logging only, nothing is blocked
HeartSuite captures which programs run during startup and shutdown,
then adds them as allowlist entries so they are permitted in Secure Mode.
Each boot cycle may reveal new programs — shutdown handlers, timed
services, or delayed processes. This typically takes 3–5 cycles,
each followed by a reboot. The tool tracks progress and reports
when no new entries are found.
